ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rhs_vectors" (
  "rhs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RHS vector */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the RHS vector */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated optimization model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the RHS vector */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the RHS vector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the RHS vector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the RHS vector was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the RHS vector */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the RHS vector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rhs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constraints" (
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constraint */,
  "rhs_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated RHS vector */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated optimization model */,
  "cname1" TEXT /* First constraint name */,
  "value1" REAL /* First numerical value of the constraint */,
  "cname2" TEXT /* Second constraint name (optional) */,
  "value2" REAL /* Second numerical value of the constraint (optional) */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the constraint is required */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the constraint */,
  "constraint_type" TEXT /* Type of the constraint */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the constraint */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the constraint */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the constraint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constraint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constraints_rhs_id FOREIGN KEY ("rhs_id") REFERENCES rhs_vectors ("rhs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "rhs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RHS vector being accessed */,
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constraint being accessed (if applicable) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_rhs_id FOREIGN KEY ("rhs_id") REFERENCES rhs_vectors ("rhs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_constraint_id FOREIGN KEY ("constraint_id") REFERENCES constraints ("constraint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report (in JSON format) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constraint_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the constraint group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the constraint group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the constraint group */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated optimization model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the group (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the group */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constraint_group_membership" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership record */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constraint group */,
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constraint that is a member of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constraint_group_membership_constraint_id FOREIGN KEY ("constraint_id") REFERENCES constraints ("constraint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constraint_group_membership_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES constraint_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metadata record */,
  "rhs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated RHS vector (if applicable) */,
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated constraint (if applicable) */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata entry */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata entry */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of the metadata (e.g., system, user-defined) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_rhs_id FOREIGN KEY ("rhs_id") REFERENCES rhs_vectors ("rhs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_constraint_id FOREIGN KEY ("constraint_id") REFERENCES constraints ("constraint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "rhs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RHS vector being versioned */,
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constraint being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_rhs_id FOREIGN KEY ("rhs_id") REFERENCES rhs_vectors ("rhs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_constraint_id FOREIGN KEY ("constraint_id") REFERENCES constraints ("constraint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the notification */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "rhs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RHS vector that was changed */,
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constraint that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the change (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_constraint_id FOREIGN KEY ("constraint_id") REFERENCES constraints ("constraint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_rhs_id FOREIGN KEY ("rhs_id") REFERENCES rhs_vectors ("rhs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "rhs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated RHS vector */,
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated constraint */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated optimization model */,
  "analytics_type" TEXT /* Type of analytics performed (e.g., impact analysis) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value derived from the analytics process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analytics (e.g., in-progress, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the analytics */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_rhs_id FOREIGN KEY ("rhs_id") REFERENCES rhs_vectors ("rhs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_constraint_id FOREIGN KEY ("constraint_id") REFERENCES constraints ("constraint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tag_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag assignment */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated tag */,
  "rhs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RHS vector (if applicable) */,
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constraint (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tag assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tag assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tag_assignments_constraint_id FOREIGN KEY ("constraint_id") REFERENCES constraints ("constraint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tag_assignments_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tag_assignments_rhs_id FOREIGN KEY ("rhs_id") REFERENCES rhs_vectors ("rhs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the action (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
